description_long: This object is a rectangular metal guard rail composed of a grid of evenly spaced vertical and horizontal bars, forming a lattice structure. The bars are cylindrical and appear to be welded or fixed at each intersection, providing a rigid and sturdy frame. The overall finish is metallic gray, suggesting galvanized or stainless steel construction for durability and corrosion resistance. The ends of the horizontal bars extend slightly beyond the vertical frame, giving the rail a utilitarian, industrial appearance. There are no visible mounting plates or flanges, indicating that the rail may be designed for embedded or post-driven installation. The surface is hard, smooth, and slightly reflective, typical of metal barriers used in urban environments for safety and demarcation.
description: A rectangular metal guard rail with a grid of vertical and horizontal bars, finished in metallic gray and designed for urban safety applications.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full grid of vertical and horizontal metal bars with all intersections visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the guard rail, with bars appearing as a single line.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the grid structure and bar intersections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the rail with minimal visible detail.
